channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: US on track to have historically low number of homicides in 2026, report says
item.description: A new report from the Council on Criminal Justice shows an 18% decrease in the homicide rate across 30 American cities from 2025 compared to the same period in 2026.

item.title: Tropical Storm Bertha makes landfall in Louisiana and moves toward Texas
AP Exclusive: A boater’s photo may be ‘the last picture’ of group drowned in an Ohio river
